name: Romania Unique
uniques: No defensive terrain bonus <for [{Military} {Land}] units> <in [Romania] tiles> <for [non-[Romania]] Civilizations>

name: T-55 stuff
uniques: When defeating a [{T-55} {non-[Captured Tank]} {non-[Rescued Tank]}] unit, earn [75] Gold and recruit it <with [75]% chance> <for [{Major} {non-[Soviet]}] Civilizations>
When defeating a [{T-55} {Captured Tank}] unit, earn [125] Gold and recruit it <for [Soviet] Civilizations>
Triggers a [T-55 Capture] event <upon gaining a [T-55] unit> <for [non-[Soviet]] Civilizations> <when number of [Remaining [Soviet] Civilizations] is more than [0]>
Triggers a [T-55 Rescue] event <upon gaining a [T-55] unit> <for [Soviet] Civilizations>

name: Lusitanian Duo Boost
uniques: [+15]% Strength <for [10] turns> <upon entering a war with [Lusitanian] Civilizations>
